pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly expect the email to be changed to 'admin@example.com'.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly check for the generated encrypted password in this file.
setup_artifactory.sh configures Artifactory OSS and explicitly sets/verifies the default username 'admin'.
setup_artifactory.sh configures Artifactory OSS and explicitly sets/verifies the default password 'password'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a locally deployed instance of JFrog Artifactory OSS initialized with default credentials (admin / password). The task explicitly requires the agent to change the admin's email to 'admin@example.com' and extract the dynamically generated Encrypted Password into the '/home/ga/encrypted_password.txt' file.
